entity.summary: Self-custodial crypto trading platform for options, perpetuals, and spot markets, using an order-book exchange with trustless settlement through the Derive Protocol and Derive Chain.
entity.notes: Classified as hybrid because official documentation states that Derive Exchange uses a centralized limit order book while the platform remains self-custodial and settles trades and liquidations through the Derive Protocol and Chain in a trustless manner.

evidence.title: Derive developer hub introduction
evidence.notes: First-party documentation describes Derive as a self-custodial trading platform for options, perpetuals, and spot, and explains the Exchange, Protocol, and Chain architecture.

evidence.title: Derive official trading website
evidence.notes: Current first-party website advertises live on-chain options, perpetuals, and spot trading and links to active trading surfaces.

evidence.title: Derive CCXT exchange integration
evidence.notes: Secondary exchange-library source includes Derive support; first-party documentation remains the classification and status authority.
